title: Scalable Monorepo with Turborepo
description: Set up a Turborepo monorepo with shared UI packages, shared config (ESLint, TypeScript), testing, and CI/CD for multiple Next.js applications.

steps.description: Initialize the Turborepo workspace with apps/ and packages/ structure
Add the main Next.js app to apps/ and configure it to consume shared packages
Set up a shared UI component library in packages/ui consumable across all apps
Configure shared ESLint flat config in packages/eslint-config, extended by every app and package
Add shared validation schemas and TypeScript types in packages/validators
Configure testing for each package with a shared Vitest setup in packages/vitest-config
Set up CI that uses Turborepo remote caching to only build and test affected packages
Deploy each Next.js app independently to Vercel, with root directory pointing to apps/<name>
